failedAssertions.reason: Required Heart Rate baseline-band contract remains unmet: heart_rate baseline key absent and observed fill opacity evidence remained above contract threshold.
With only 10 baseline-window points, API still returned populated baselines for night/recovery (sample_count=10), violating suppression expectation.
API night-window bounds were correct, but frontend evidence still did not satisfy required 8 PM–8 AM axis labeling contract.
Night UI did not render glucose strip and did not show the required shared overnight axis alignment across strips/hypnogram.
Night UI showed "No sleep stage data available"; required hypnogram stage bars and legend were not rendered.
Summary strip still omitted Sleep Latency metric/delta badge required by the contract.
S1 causal chain was not visible end-to-end (missing glucose panel/hypnogram evidence and required summary deltas).
Recovery view still missed the required Body Temp Deviation panel in the multi-day strip set.
S3-specific fixture expectations were not observed (for example no "10K run" marker and no "3 days" insight text).
Correlation card with Pearson coefficients/strength labels and in-card Share action was still absent on the tested Trend UI.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked by runtime precondition: rerun occurred after the tested night window had already completed, so in-progress-night behavior was not executable.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated Inngest service start command to sync app handlers (`-u http://localhost:3100/api/inngest`) so job assertions can execute with registered functions.
Added curl-surface guidance for Inngest handler sync and reproducible expired-share validation workflow.
